title: Cheese & Broccoli Pasta
summary: This cheese and broccoli pasta is like the beloved Pasta 'N Sauce from the packet, but infinitely better! A one-pot wonder, it comes together in less than 30 minutes, making it perfect for busy weeknights. It's a meal the whole family will love!

ingredients.label: 400g Mezzi Rigatoni (Any Other Small, Tubular Pasta Shape Will Work Well Too)
ingredients.name: Rigatoni

ingredients.label: 400g Mezzi Rigatoni (Any Other Small, Tubular Pasta Shape Will Work Well Too)
ingredients.name: Pasta

method.description: Get your biggest pan on a medium-low heat and warm olive oil. Finely chop the garlic then fry for 3 mins until just golden. Add the vegetable stock, milk, butter, onion powder, pasta and then mix the cornflour with water and add in as well. Season with salt and pepper then bring to a boil, reduce to a simmer and cook for 10 mins.

While that's cooking, chop the broccoli. Then grate the Parmesan and finely chop the parsley. Add the broccoli to the pasta and continue cooking for another 10 mins – by this point the broccoli and the pasta should be tender, and the sauce thickened. Add in Parmesan and parsley, then give it a good mix – if it's looking too thick just loosen with a splash of milk.
Plate up, top with a bit more parsley and Parm if you like, and that's it!

chefs.name: Jodie Nixon
chefs.summary: Jodie is a recipe writer, Mob food producer, and professional snacker. When she's not recreating all your childhood classics, she's creating delicious veg-forward dishes that'll prove you don't always need meat to have a good time. She's one hell of a talented cook.
